name: Ghosts of Mist Harbor Mansion: Multiplayer Haunted House Horror

reviews.review_description: I had to uninstall the game. I suffered a dose of severe motion sickness after first 45 minutes despite trying to navigate slowly. Graphics were very poor and unrealistic. The game felt very clumsy and uncomfortable to play. Sorry not for me.

So promising loved mirewood manor but this one has a lot of bugs and not the ones inside the mansion. Very Glitchy, and didnt knw if I was outside or inside . Sometimes u can’t move at all and when snap turning u end up outside of the map I was lost and I really am dying for another mirewood manor so bought it I’m going to gv it some time but needs a lotof attention on stairs jumping even just walking. Lost on what puzzle was where and then story never really got that either. Don’t get this game until updated!!  hopefully be updated caus it’s pretty close to unplayable and too dark even with flashlight lost on the puzzles and story couldn’t go up and down stairs. Check bk and don’t wanna rate too low caus promising but hope can fix a lot pretty quick.

reviews.review_title: Good game at the price point.
reviews.review_description:
My wife and I played a bit of this last night, and it’s pretty good. A couple points to keep in mind before you buy:
- The movement is pretty intense, motion sickness wise. There doesn’t appear to be an option for “teleport” style movement or tunnel-vision/vignette when moving. It’s strictly “slide” style movement and snap rotation. I was OK with it, but my wife almost got sick. 
- Some of the collision stuff is funky. There are some doorways where you have to clip through the door frame to get into a room and can’t just walk through the door. 
- It’s an $8 game. This isn’t AAA quality, but it’s worth the price. Let’s encourage the developers to keep going and make even better games.

This game has a lot… story, jump scares, puzzles and spooky!

Graphics are ok, sounds are spooky and the atmosphere is decent! There’s some very disturbing ghost/demon designs. I love the photos in the frames. 

Puzzles are scattered through the mansion, they will get you thinking. Be easier if there was an inventory to store items.


You can move around the mansion from area to area, but it’sbetter to solve puzzles in one area before moving on to next.

 It’s a decent game for the price you pay

A new scary game has joined the meta fray.
A great idea and concept, had a few early jump scares but nothing too horrifying.

Go through the mansion solving puzzles in the huge mansion.
Solve a riddle and move on to the next.
Graphics are ok not Quest 3 but it doeswhat it needs to do.

I’m having fun so far, good work by the devs.

Git to gooseneck wing finish says go to azimuth wing have been back through every room 3 times saw it at the start but can't  find it now i keep having to go through the same rooms thanks great game tho but is the game over in the boat?

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed the game and thanks for purchasing the bundle! The game is over once you've hit 100% completion, otherwise that means there are still some rooms you need to explore and some puzzles left to be solved.

reviews.review_description: I love the simplicity of this game.   I've been playing Ghosts of Mist Harbor Mansion with my spouse, and it combines two of my favorite game genres: suspense and puzzler styles!! Don't count this one out - challenging enough to keep you invested, but not so challenging to cause frustration.  For those of you who don't love horror in VR, FEAR NOT! This one has the occasional fright appear, but there are no chases and the boogeymen quickly disappear. The real rush is trying to solve the mysteries before the lights go out!! Luckily - you are equipped with a 🔦.  I love a game that makes me think and allows me to work together with friends.  There is a ton of content as each room of the mansion presents its own set of puzzles to solve.  This game is a steal.
Looks like it could be fun for my grandkids but since installing it my headset glitches so I Uninstalled it.
Love the suspense and mystery,  great exploration into a huge mansion full.of surprises . . Fantastic in everyway

Do I recommend? Yes! It’s fun! Explore multiple wings of a huuuge mansion looking for puzzles/riddles then searching for the puzzle pieces to solve each level. You can explore multiple wings without completing puzzles in previous wings, so if you get stumped, you can return later. But I recommend completing all the puzzles in one wing at a time. The riddles and puzzle pieces do not cross into other wings. I like how fast you can walk and run through the halls and rooms. I love the ghosts!! Lol 😂 I don’t know how many wings of puzzles there are in the mansion because it seems never ending so you get your money’s worth. Looking forward to continuing and finishing the game. I’ve stayed up way too late plying this game. 🥱 Addicting…..”just one more wing!”

reviews.review_title: Purchased it but haven’t received it.
reviews.review_description: For whatever reason, this won’t download on my quest 2, and it’s to late to get a refund’’ It is a brand new Quest 2, and it has not happened with any other game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for purchasing for the game! Have you tried restarting the installation process? If that doesn't work, you may need to contact support. Has this happened with any other games you've tried installing?

reviews.review_title: Mystery puzzle 🧩 with a little scare
reviews.review_description: I am absolutely loving this game. It has good puzzles and riddles to solve with different areas to explore. I recommend doing maybe one area at a time. The puzzles don’t cross into the other areas so helps keep things flowing and no going backwards and forwards from area to area. Great game enjoying every minute of it

reviews.review_title: Cool puzzler with a spooky atmosphere
reviews.review_description: This is a cool little puzzle type game where you get clues and search for items matching those clues. There are several random jump scares that made me freak out a few times. The graphics are ok and there are several “areas” to explore. It’s best played with friends and it’s absolutely hilarious when you hear one of your friends scream cuz of a jump scare. Makes the whole thing even more fun!
